headline: Investors Want A Chamath Palihapitiya ETF And They Might Get It Soon
summary: Thanks to the surge in the number of SPACs and the media coverage of them, Chamath Palihapitiya has become a familiar name among traders. Now, he's asking people what more he can offer them for investment choices.

headline: Apple's Tim Cook On Taking Down Parler: 'We're always trying to do the right thing'
summary: Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) CEO Tim Cook has commented about the company’s decision to suspend Parler from its App Store.

headline: Cramer Shares His Thoughts On American Airlines, American Tower And More
summary: On CNBC's latest "Mad Money Lightning Round," Jim Cramer said American Airlines Group Inc (NASDAQ: AAL) has moved up too much.

headline: Here's How Americans Are Spending Their Stimulus Payments
summary: The U.S. government recently sent out its second round of stimulus payments worth up to $600 per qualified person. The primary purpose of the payments was to help those who are struggling to make ends meet during the pandemic, but stimulus spending can also serve as a much-needed shot in the arm for the economy.

headline: Elon Musk Donates $5M To Online Education Platform Khan Academy
summary: Elon Musk has donated $5 million to educational platform Khan Academy.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Exxon Mobil, GameStop, Intel, 3M, Toll Brothers And More
summary:
This weekend's Barron's cover story offers thoughts and stock picks from the latest Barron's Roundtable.
	Other featured articles examine the cutting edge in biotech stocks, an outlier bubble forecast and growing corporate political activism.

headline: Apple CEO Tim Cook, on Fox News, Says if Parler Gets Their Moderation Together, They Would Be Back on Apple Store ; Says We've Never Viewed That Our Platform Should Be a Simple Replication of the Internet
Tesla Takes Legal Action Against Chinese News Outlet Over Report Of 'Sweatshop' Conditions At Shanghai Gigafactory: Global Times
summary:
Tesla Model Y

Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) is taking legal action againt a Chinese tech media outlet called PingWest that earlier reported of harsh working conditions and quality control problem at Tesla's Shanghai Gigafactory.
